characters.name: Adrian York
characters.description: Adrian YorkGender:MaleFamily:David York(father)Chrissie James(mother)Alias(es):Patrick MadsenStatus:AliveAppeared in:Luther: The Calling Adrian Yorkis a fictional character featured inLuther: The Calling. Adrian was born in Bristol toDavid York, a troubled Australian man, andChrissie York(neé James). As a young boy, he had an interest in BMX biking. His parents divorced and, during the trial for child custody, Adrian claimed his father frequently used drugs and the services of prostitutes. Court psychiatrists believed Chrissie had coached Adrian to lie about is father, and thus was causing him "emotional harm". As such, when David returned to his native Australia and, at the same time, Adrian went missing, the case of the boy's "disappearance" was not investigated despite David claiming he did not have him.

characters.name: Baba
characters.description: BabaFamily:Toby Kent(grandson; deceased)First Appearance:Series Two: Episode 2Last Appearance:Series Two: Episode 4Episode count:2Portrayed by:Pam FerrisUnderneath the surface of charm, Baba is a combination of a Mitford sister and a Machiavellian old woman. She is the major antagonist in the second series of Luther. Calculating and intimidating she runs a tight operation using fear, subjugation and small acts of kindness to acquire utter loyalty from her 'family'; the 'family' she has deliberately chosen and brought together. She utterly relies and trusts Frank, only ever refusing his advice when it comes to the subject ofToby, her treasured grandson. InLuther, Baba has spotted the perfect opportunity to have an insider on the police force, she believes him to be Frank's successor as chief 'security advisor'. But Baba has underestimated Luther's resilience.[1]

characters.name: Bill Winingham
characters.description: William WininghamOccupation:CriminalGender:MaleFamily:Tom Meyer(nephew; deceased)Nickname(s):BillStatus:DeceasedAppeared in:S01E05Episode count:1Portrayed by:Alexander Morton William Wininghamis a minor antagonist in series 1 ofLuther. William, referred to as Bill, is a career criminal. He specializes in money laundering. Due to his criminal behavior, he is well-known to DCIIan Reed. He and Reed have worked together, with Reed taking bribes and letting Bill and his associates commit crimes.

characters.name: Caroline Jones
characters.description: Caroline JonesOccupation:MotherGender:FemaleFamily:Jenny Jones(daughter)Jones(father; deceased)Status:AliveFirst Appearance:Series Two: Episode 1Last Appearance:Series Two: Episode 4Episode count:4Portrayed by:Kierston Wareing Caroline Jones is the mother ofJenny JonesSeveral years earlier, Jenny's father murdered a prostitute and panicked, cutting the body into multiple pieces and hiding the pieces in trash bins across London. DCIJohn Lutherpursued him and, according to Caroline, humiliated him. InS02E01, Caroline comes to Luther and asks him to help her daughter, stating that he owes her. He talks to Jenny before she is set to appear in one of her adult films, but is unable to convince her to leave with him. He walks away, but shortly thereafter changes his mind and bursts into the scene and arrests her. He hides her in a safe-house where she is watched over byMark North. Luther later asks her if she would like to change her life; leave the drugs and sex behind. However, her boss, a ruthless elderly woman known asBaba, wants her back. Luther begins working for Baba to set Jenny free.

characters.description: Corinne AldrichOccupation:UnknownGender:FemaleFamily:Callum Aldrich(Son)Date of Birth:UnknownStatus:AliveAppeared in:Luther:The fallen sunPortrayed by:Hattie MorahanCorinne Aldrichis a character of the 2023 crime thrillerLuther: The Fallen Sun. She is mother of Callum Aldrich,She is annoyed at Luther for failing to find her son. Corinne Aldrich’s son Callum goes missing somehow she finds out and attends the scene where he was kidnapped and she meets DCI John Luther,Luther says he is in charge of finding her son.The DCI tells her not to worry and he promises to find Callum.

characters.description: Dennis SorrelOccupation:Police officerGender:MaleRank:Police ConstableStatus:Deceased Dennis Sorrelis a fictional character mentioned inLuther. Dennis was a police officer in theMetropolitan Police Service. He held the rank of police constable. He attempted to arrestTerry Lynch, a drunk former soldier, but was killed in the process. Terry was arrested and sentenced to serve life in prison with no chance of parole.

characters.name: Douglas Morgan
characters.description: Douglas MorganOccupation:PoetGender:MaleFamily:Laura Morgan(wife; deceased)Alice Morgan(daughter; deceased)Status:DeceasedAppeared in:S01E01Episode count:1 Douglas Morganis a fictional character featured inLuther. Douglas was the husband ofLaura Morgan, with whom he had a daughter,Alice Morgan. He was a published small press poet. His daughter, Alice, was a child prodigy and entered Oxford University at age 13. Alice admits that she felt like a freak and hated her parents.

characters.name: Emma Lane
characters.description: Emma LaneGender:FemaleRank:Detective SergeantFirst Appearance:Series Four: Episode 1Last Appearance:Series Four: Episode 2Episode count:2Portrayed by:Rose LeslieThe newest recruit to the Serious and Serial Unit, Emma finds herself working side by side with the legendaryJohn Luther. Growing up, Emma was always the posh one – perhaps not a natural fit among the crack troops of the Serious and Serial Unit. But there’s plenty of grit beneath her privileged exterior and she’s ready to fight tooth and nail in the line of duty.

characters.name: Emma Lane
characters.description: Emma LaneGender:FemaleRank:Detective SergeantFirst Appearance:Series Four: Episode 1Last Appearance:Series Four: Episode 2Episode count:2Portrayed by:Rose LeslieThe newest recruit to the Serious and Serial Unit, Emma finds herself working side by side with the legendaryJohn Luther. characters.name: Erin Gray
characters.description: Erin GrayOccupation:Police detectiveGender:FemaleFamily:UnknownRank:Detective Chief InspectorDate of Birth:UnknownStatus:AliveFirst Appearance:Series Two: Episode 1Last Appearance:Series Three: Episode 4Episode count:8Portrayed by:Nikki Amuka-Bird She is a main character in the second series and the secondary antagonist in the third series of the TV Series,'Luther.' DCI Erin Grayis a new member of the team inSeries 2. She is highly intelligent and ambitious, but young and naive, having come from a sheltered background. She makes it clear in Season two, episode 1 that she doesn't want her name tarnished likeRipley's, and she keeps her distance fromLuther. Luther keeps her on because she is newly qualified and good at her job. Having become convinced that Luther is dirty, she attempts to find evidence of this during Series 2. She discovers him onMartin Schenk's computer and notifies the captain, but Ripley eliminates the evidence to protect Luther and she is reprimanded as a result.

characters.name: Evangeline Nixon
characters.description: Evangeline NixonGender:FemaleNickname(s):EvieStatus:Alive; incarceratedAppeared in:S01E05Episode count:1Portrayed by:Ania Sowinski Evangeline Nixonis a fictional character featured inLuther. Evangeline, sometimes referred to as Evie, is an American criminal with a long history of violence. She has a criminal record consisting of extortion and suspected kidnapping. She is married toDaniel Sugarman.
